name: Cash Store
description_short: Helotes, TX's Cash Store at 9708 Business Pkwy offers payday and title loans with convenient hours and fast approvals.
description_long:
Cash Store is located at 9708 Business Pkwy Suite 104 in Helotes, TX, operating as a standalone storefront. This Helotes location specializes in payday loans and title loans, open Monday–Friday 10 AM–7 PM, Saturday 10 AM–3 PM, and closed Sundays. The store serves the Helotes community with quick lending solutions.

At the Helotes, TX branch, Cash Store staff can help you explore payday loans, title loans, and related services. Call +1 210-695-8500 to ask about your specific situation and application options.

Helotes residents using this location should bring a government ID, proof of income, and information about an active bank account for your application.
pros: Same-day funding typically available after in-store approval
Accepts Matricula Consular card as valid ID — accessible to immigrant borrowers
Online pre-qualification lets applicants check eligibility before visiting a branch
Considers applicants with bad or no credit history
Existing customers can refinance or re-loan by phone without a full in-store visit
4.9/5 Google rating across 208 reviews at this Houston branch
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard available for customers without traditional debit access
cons: No APR, fee, or loan amount ranges disclosed anywhere on the website
Application must be completed in-store — not a fully online lender
Requires an active checking account open at least 30 days, excluding the fully unbanked
Limited branch hours (closes 6pm weekdays, 2pm Saturday, closed Sunday)
Loans from Cash Store and similar installment lenders typically carry very high interest rates
best_for: Borrowers with bad or no credit who need cash quickly
Immigrant borrowers who hold a Matricula Consular card as their primary ID
Existing Cash Store customers looking to refinance or take a second loan
Consumers who want to pre-qualify online before committing to an in-store visit
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for credit-challenged borrowers — including immigrants with Matricula Consular IDs — who need same-day cash and live near a branch location. The main caveat is that APRs are never disclosed on the website, and installment loans from this class of lender typically carry very high rates; borrowers should compare the full cost of borrowing before signing.
services: Retail remote refinancing (by phone for existing customers)
Retail remote reloans (by phone for existing customers)
meta_description: Cash Store at 9708 Business Pkwy, Helotes, TX. Fast payday and title loans with convenient hours.
